channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trainee IPS Officer Faces Sexual Harassment Allegations and Suicide Attempt
item.description: A 32-year-old trainee IPS officer, accused of sexually harassing a female colleague at the National Police Academy (NPA) in Hyderabad, allegedly attempted suicide after a criminal case was registered ...

item.title: Calgary City Council Proposes Doubling Funding for Werklund Centre Modernization Amid Rising Costs
item.description: The City of Calgary has requested to double its financial commitment to the modernization of the Werklund Centre, formerly known as Arts Commons, as project costs have surged to $345 million. This fin...

item.title: KRA Staff Pension Scheme Opens Recruitment for Four Positions
item.description: The Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) Staff Pension Scheme has launched a recruitment drive for four positions across administration, ICT, pensions, and procurement. Qualified Kenyans are invited to apply...

item.title: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner attend World Cup Final before singer steps out in stylish New York outfit
item.description: Dua Lipa attracted attention for her fashion choices after attending the 2026 FIFA World Cup Final in New Jersey with her husband Callum Turner. The singer, 30, watched Spain defeat Argentina 1-0 at t...

item.title: UDOM Lecturer's Detention Sparks Debate on Academic Freedom
item.description: The detention of University of Dodoma (UDOM) lecturer Melkisedeki Kaijage has sparked concerns about academic freedom in Tanzania. Academics and their union warn that the incident could undermine univ...

item.title: US and Canada Engage in Trade Dispute Over Tariffs
item.description: The US has imposed 50% tariffs on $20 billion worth of Canadian imports, citing discriminatory practices against American goods. President Trump invoked Section 338 of the 1930 Tariff Act, marking its...

item.title: South Carolina Senator Darline Graham Announces Full Senate Bid Focusing on Domestic Issues
item.description: Sen. Darline Graham, R-S.C., the sister of late Sen. Lindsey Graham, has announced her candidacy for a full six-year Senate term following her brother's sudden death on July 11. In an exclusive interv...

item.title: 65-year-old Malmesbury man arrested for drug dealing and firearm possession
item.description: A 65-year-old man from Malmesbury has been arrested and charged with drug dealing and illegal firearm possession following a police operation in Wesbank. Authorities seized mandrax, ecstasy tablets, a...

item.title: Senator Padilla Calls for Stronger Measures Against China Coast Guard Incidents
item.description: Senator Robinhood Padilla has condemned the recent aggressive actions of the China Coast Guard (CCG) against Philippine Navy personnel in the West Philippine Sea, urging the government to take decisiv...

item.title: Albert Ojwang's Widow Reacts as Prosecutors Outline Evidence in Murder Case Against Six Police Officers
item.description: Nevnina Onyango, the widow of Albert Ojwang, expressed deep grief after prosecutors presented their opening statement in the High Court murder case involving six police officers, including former Cent...

item.title: Fola's Journey from Betting Cashier to Stardom and His Philosophy on Success
item.description: Nigerian singer Fola shares his humble beginnings as a Bet9ja cashier in Ibadan and his rise to stardom. He credits his mother for instilling confidence in him, saying she always believed he'd become ...

item.title: Jayson Gillham and Iyad Sughayer's collaborative concert highlights artistic freedom and absence of bitterness
item.description: The article details Jayson Gillham's concert with Palestinian-Jordanian pianist Iyad Sughayer, emphasizing their collaboration's absence of bitterness and its lack of media coverage. The performance i...

item.title: Australia and Philippines Strengthen Maritime Cooperation Amid China's South China Sea Activities
item.description: Australia has expressed concerns over China's growing assertiveness in the South China Sea, while simultaneously enhancing the Philippines' maritime capabilities to address regional security challenge...

item.title: Former President Jonathan Reflects on Peace Efforts in Niger Delta
item.description: Ex-President Goodluck Jonathan shared his experience of negotiating peace in the Niger Delta by visiting militant camps without armed security, a move that helped build trust and led to the amnesty pr...

item.title: Space Colonization and Legal Challenges: SpaceX's Ambitions and Global Implications
item.description: The article discusses the legal and ethical dilemmas surrounding SpaceX's expansion into space, particularly its Starlink project and Mars colonization plans. Elon Musk's ventures raise concerns about...

item.title: Public Service Commission Opens 131 Positions Across Ministries, Departments, and Universities
item.description: The Public Service Commission (PSC) has opened 131 job vacancies across various government ministries, state departments, and universities. The roles include 100 foreign service cadet positions under ...

item.title: Delft officers intervene to protect infant from intoxicated father's neglect
item.description: Law enforcement officers in Delft, South Africa, intervened during a routine traffic stop to rescue a crying infant from an intoxicated father. The incident occurred late Sunday evening when officers ...

item.title: PM Modi Congratulates Andy Burnham on Becoming British Prime Minister
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi extended his congratulations to Andy Burnham, the newly appointed British Prime Minister, emphasizing the shared democratic values between India and the United Kingdom. Th...

item.title: Tanzania opposition leader released on bail after conspiracy charges
item.description: Opposition leader Neema Chozaire was granted bail after being charged with conspiracy to murder police officers. The Geita Sub-Registry of the High Court ordered her release following a petition by he...

item.title: Canada's Soccer Future: Owen Goodman's Rise and the Path to 2030
item.description: Owen Goodman, Canada's 22-year-old goalkeeper, is emerging as a key figure in the nation's soccer future following the historic 2026 World Cup campaign. The article highlights his rapid development as...
